title: Christie Patrick
compiled_truth: Christie Patrick is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-01-28 to 2002-05-06), Christie Patrick sent 79 and received 310 emails, totalling 389 interactions. Top correspondents: [Vince Kaminski](people/vince-kaminski) (45), [Mark Palmer](people/mark-palmer) (18), [Jeffrey Shankman](people/jeffrey-shankman) (14), [Jeff Skilling](people/jeff-skilling) (14), [Steven Kean](people/steven-kean) (13). Mailbox folders observed: _americas, aadepartment, deleted_items, inbox, prc, rice.
